testcase.name: test_duplicate_check_with_agency_phone

failure.message: AssertionError: assert ('agency' in 'invalid phone number' or 'already registered' in 'invalid phone number') + where 'invalid phone number' = <built-in method lower of str object at 0xfd69fb672ce0>() + where <built-in method lower of str object at 0xfd69fb672ce0> = 'Invalid phone number'.lower + where 'Invalid phone number' = <built-in method get of dict object at 0xfd69fb6bf880>('detail', '') + where <built-in method get of dict object at 0xfd69fb6bf880> = {'detail': 'Invalid phone number'}.get + and 'invalid phone number' = <built-in method lower of str object at 0xfd69fb672ce0>() + where <built-in method lower of str object at 0xfd69fb672ce0> = 'Invalid phone number'.lower + where 'Invalid phone number' = <built-in method get of dict object at 0xfd69fb6bf880>('detail', '') + where <built-in method get of dict object at 0xfd69fb6bf880> = {'detail': 'Invalid phone number'}.get

testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_portal_features.py:120: in test_duplicate_check_with_agency_phone assert "agency" in response_data.get("detail", "").lower() or "already registered" in response_data.get("detail", "").lower() E AssertionError: assert ('agency' in 'invalid phone number' or 'already registered' in 'invalid phone number') E + where 'invalid phone number' = <built-in method lower of str object at 0xfd69fb672ce0>() E + where <built-in method lower of str object at 0xfd69fb672ce0> = 'Invalid phone number'.lower E + where 'Invalid phone number' = <built-in method get of dict object at 0xfd69fb6bf880>('detail', '') E + where <built-in method get of dict object at 0xfd69fb6bf880> = {'detail': 'Invalid phone number'}.get E + and 'invalid phone number' = <built-in method lower of str object at 0xfd69fb672ce0>() E + where <built-in method lower of str object at 0xfd69fb672ce0> = 'Invalid phone number'.lower E + where 'Invalid phone number' = <built-in method get of dict object at 0xfd69fb6bf880>('detail', '') E + where <built-in method get of dict object at 0xfd69fb6bf880> = {'detail': 'Invalid phone number'}.get

testcase.name: test_send_new_password_to_agency
testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_portal_features.py:233: in test_send_new_password_to_agency assert response.status_code == 200, f"Expected 200 but got {response.status_code}: {response.text}" E AssertionError: Expected 200 but got 400: {"detail":"Customer has no valid phone number"} E assert 400 == 200 E + where 400 = <Response [400]>.status_code

skipped.message: No pending customers found to test approval
